name: Zucchini-Tomato Tian
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F. In a skillet, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil over medium heat. Add onions and sauté for 10 minutes or until tender. Add 1 teaspoon thyme and 1/4 teaspoon each salt and pepper.
2. Cut each tomato lengthwise into 4 slices. Slice zucchini crosswise into 1/2-inch diagonal slices. Arrange tomato, zucchini, and onion slices in rows across the width of a 2-1/2 quart shallow baking dish.
3. In a small bowl, combine remaining 3 tablespoons olive oil, 1/2 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper; mix. Drizzle over vegetables. Cover tightly with foil. Bake for 15 minutes; uncover. Bake an additional 30 minutes or until vegetables are tender. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
Nutritional Information/Serving:
120 calories
3 grams protein
13 grams carbohydrate
7 grams fat
0 cholesterol
212 milligrams sodium
